lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਭਾਣਾ ਕਿਸਹਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhaane vich vaddee vaddiaaee bhaanaa kiseh karaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: Glorious greatness rests in God's Will; rare are those who accept it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis bhaanaa bhaavai so tujheh samaae |
lines.english: One who is pleased with Your Will is immersed in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tis bhaavai taa guroo milaae |
lines.english: When it pleases His Will, He leads us to meet the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਭਾਣਾ ਦੇਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tudh aapanai bhaanai sabh srisatt upaaee jis no bhaanaa dehi tis bhaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: By Your Will, You created the whole Universe; those whom You bless with Your favor are pleased with Your Will. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam padaarath paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh finds the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਰੇ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andh kare chaturaaee |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs practice cleverness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣਾ ਨ ਮੰਨੇ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanaa na mane bahut dukh paaee |
lines.english: They do not surrender to the Lord's Will, and suffer terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਧੁਰਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa dhur furamaaee |
lines.english: The Primal Lord ordained service to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਏ ਘਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolaa aavai jaae ghar mehal na kabahoo paaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, they come and go in reincarnation; they never find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur mele de vaddiaaee |
lines.english: The True Guru brings Union, and grants glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa naam paae naame hee sukh paaeidaa |6|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the Naam is obtained. Through the Naam, one finds peace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਛੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh naavahu upajai naavahu chheejai |
lines.english: Everything wells up from the Naam, and through the Naam, perishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਕੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mahalai andar mehal ko paae |
lines.english: Rare are those who find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence within the mansion of their own body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te man tan bheejai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the mind and body are pleased with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਰਸਿ ਭੀਜੈ ਰਸ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: rasanaa naam dhiaae ras bheejai ras hee te ras paaeidaa |7|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the tongue is drenched with the Lord's sublime essence. Through this essence, the Essence is obtained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਇ ਸੋਈ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jis no sach dee soee sach paae sache sach milaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: Whoever the Lord blesses with Truth obtains Truth; he merges in Truth, and only Truth. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sach chit laae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they lovingly focus their consciousness on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੈ ਕੁਸਟੀ ਨਰਕੇ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin naavai man tan hai kusattee narake vaasaa paaeidaa |9|
lines.english: Without the Name, his mind and body are afflicted with leprosy, and he obtains his home in hell. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam visaar man tan dukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind and body suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabh rog kamaaeaa |
lines.english: Attached to the love of Maya, he earns nothing but disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੰਸਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਨੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: niramal hansaa sadaa sukh nehaa |
lines.english: Their soul-swan is immaculate, and in the Lord's Love, they find eternal peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam rate tin niramal dehaa |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Naam - their bodies are immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naam salaeh sadaa sukh paaeaa nij ghar vaasaa paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: Praising the Naam, they find eternal peace, and dwell in the home of their own inner being. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko vanaj kare vaapaaraa |
lines.english: Everyone deals and trades.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no naam dee so paae |
lines.english: He alone obtains the Naam, unto whom the Lord gives it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਗੋ ਆਇਆ ਨਾਗੋ ਜਾਸੀ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naago aaeaa naago jaasee vin naavai dukh paaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Naked they come, and naked they go; without the Name, they suffer in pain. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਤੋਟਾ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai sabh tottaa sansaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Name, all the world loses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har man vasaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te naam vasiaa ghatt antar naamo naam dhiaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Naam dwells deep within the heart, and one meditates upon the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jinee naau paaeaa se vaddabhaagee gur kai sabad milaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: Those who obtain the Name are very fortunate. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are united with God. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵੈ ਨੋ ਲੋਚੈ ਜੇਤੀ ਸਭ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: naavai no lochai jetee sabh aaee |
lines.english: Everyone who comes into the world, longs for the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naau tinaa milai dhur purab kamaaee |
lines.english: They alone are blessed with the Name, whose past actions were so ordained by the Primal Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੋਟੁ ਅਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kott at apaaraa |
lines.english: Utterly incomparable is the fortress of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਬਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich beh prabh kare veechaaraa |
lines.english: Within it, God sits in contemplation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਨਿਆਉ ਸਚੋ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sachaa niaau sacho vaapaaraa nihachal vaasaa paaeidaa |14|
lines.english: He administers true justice, and trades in Truth; through Him, one finds the eternal, unchanging dwelling. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਘਰ ਬੰਕੇ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar ghar banke thaan suhaaeaa |
lines.english: Deep within the inner self are glorious homes and beautiful places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਥਾਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh viralai kinai thaan paaeaa |
lines.english: But rare is that person who, as Gurmukh, finds these places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਸਾਥਿ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਸਚੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: eit saath nibahai saalaahe sache har sachaa man vasaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: If one stays in these places, and praises the True Lord, the True Lord comes to dwell in the mind. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਭ ਵਥੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis dehee vich sabh vath paaee |
lines.english: He has placed everything within this body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਕਰਤੈ ਇਕ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: merai karatai ik banat banaaee |
lines.english: My Creator Lord has formed this formation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਣਜਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੬॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vanajeh rang raate guramukh ko naam paaeidaa |16|6|20|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who deal in the Naam are imbued with His Love. The Gurmukh obtains the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||16||6||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kanchan sabad veechaaraa |
lines.english: Contemplating the Word of the Shabad, the body becomes golden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tithai har vasai jis daa ant na paaraavaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord abides there; He has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin har sevihu sachee baanee har jeeo sabad milaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: Night and day, serve the Lord, and chant the True Word of the Guru's Bani. Through the Shabad, meet the Dear Lord. ||1||
